mapper.select: SELECT CODE_GROUP_ID AS codeGroupId, CODE AS code, CODE_NAME AS codeName, CODE_DESC AS codeDesc, SORT_ORDER AS sortOrder, USE_YN AS useYn, CODE_ENGNAME AS codeEngname, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS lastUpdateDtime, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID AS lastUpdateUserId FROM FWK_CODE WHERE CODE_GROUP_ID = #{codeGroupId} AND CODE = #{code}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FWK_CODE ( CODE_GROUP_ID, CODE, CODE_NAME, CODE_DESC, SORT_ORDER, USE_YN, CODE_ENGNAME, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID ) VALUES ( #{dto.codeGroupId}, #{dto.code}, #{dto.codeName}, #{dto.codeDesc, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.sortOrder}, #{dto.useYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.codeEngname, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lastUpdateDtime}, #{lastUpdateUserId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE FWK_CODE SET CODE_NAME = #{dto.codeName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CODE_DESC = #{dto.codeDesc, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SORT_ORDER = #{dto.sortOrder, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, USE_YN = #{dto.useYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CODE_ENGNAME = #{dto.codeEngname, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME = #{lastUpdateDtime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID = #{lastUpdateUserId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE CODE_GROUP_ID = #{codeGroupId} AND CODE = #{code}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM FWK_CODE WHERE CODE_GROUP_ID = #{codeGroupId} AND CODE = #{code}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FWK_CODE WHERE CODE_GROUP_ID = #{codeGroupId} AND CODE = #{code}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FWK_CODE WHERE CODE_GROUP_ID = #{codeGroupId}
mapper.sql: FROM FWK_CODE c INNER JOIN FWK_CODE_GROUP cg ON c.CODE_GROUP_ID = cg.CODE_GROUP_ID
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FWK_CODE c INNER JOIN FWK_CODE_GROUP cg ON c.CODE_GROUP_ID = cg.CODE_GROUP_ID

SELECT c.CODE_GROUP_ID AS codeGroupId, c.CODE AS code, c.CODE_NAME AS codeName, c.CODE_DESC AS codeDesc, c.SORT_ORDER AS sortOrder, c.USE_YN AS useYn, c.CODE_ENGNAME AS codeEngname, c.LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS lastUpdateDtime, c.LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID AS lastUpdateUserId, cg.CODE_GROUP_NAME AS codeGroupName FROM FWK_CODE c INNER JOIN FWK_CODE_GROUP cg ON c.CODE_GROUP_ID = cg.CODE_GROUP_ID WHERE c.CODE_GROUP_ID = #{codeGroupId} AND c.CODE = #{code}

SELECT CODE_GROUP_ID AS codeGroupId, CODE AS code, CODE_NAME AS codeName, CODE_DESC AS codeDesc, SORT_ORDER AS sortOrder, USE_YN AS useYn, CODE_ENGNAME AS codeEngname, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS lastUpdateDtime, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID AS lastUpdateUserId FROM FWK_CODE WHERE CODE_GROUP_ID = #{codeGroupId} ORDER BY SORT_ORDER

SELECT c.CODE_GROUP_ID AS codeGroupId, c.CODE AS code, c.CODE_NAME AS codeName, c.CODE_DESC AS codeDesc, c.SORT_ORDER AS sortOrder, c.USE_YN AS useYn, c.CODE_ENGNAME AS codeEngname, c.LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS lastUpdateDtime, c.LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID AS lastUpdateUserId, cg.CODE_GROUP_NAME AS codeGroupName FROM FWK_CODE c INNER JOIN FWK_CODE_GROUP cg ON c.CODE_GROUP_ID = cg.CODE_GROUP_ID
ORDER BY c.CODE_GROUP_ID ORDER BY cg.CODE_GROUP_NAME ORDER BY c.CODE ORDER BY c.CODE_NAME ORDER BY c.CODE_DESC ORDER BY c.SORT_ORDER ORDER BY c.USE_YN ORDER BY c.CODE_GROUP_ID, c.SORT_ORDER
DESC ASC
ORDER BY c.CODE_GROUP_ID, c.SORT_ORDER
